Klasse ArticleUtils

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleUtils
public class ArticleUtils extends Object
The ArticleUtils class provides utility methods for handling articles, including loading and managing article categories from a JSON file, calculating prices for filling based on article details, and determining the category of an article based on its number. It also defines an enum for volume units (liters and milliliters) to assist with price calculations.

  • Verschachtelte Klassen - Übersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    static enum 
    ArticleUtils.VolumeUnit
    Enum representing volume units for price calculation, such as liters and milliliters.

  • Felddetails

    • categories

      public static Map<String, ArticleGUI.CategoryRange> categories
      Map to hold category names and their corresponding article number ranges, loaded from the categories.json file. The key is the category name (e.g., "Reinigungsmittel") and the value is an ArticleGUI.CategoryRange object that contains the category name and the start and end of the article number range for that category.

  • Methodendetails

    • loadCategories

      public static void loadCategories()
      Load categories from the categories.json resource file

    • addNewCategory

      public static void addNewCategory(String categoryName, int rangeStart, int rangeEnd)
      Add a new category with a given name and range, then save it to the categories.json file
      Parameter:
      categoryName - Name of the category to add (e.g., "Reinigungsmittel")
      rangeStart - Start of the article number range for this category (e.g., 1101)
      rangeEnd - End of the article number range for this category (e.g., 1116). Can be the same as rangeStart for single numbers.

    • getCategoryForArticle

      public static String getCategoryForArticle(String articleNumber)
      Get a category for a given article number based on loaded categories and their ranges
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to find a category for (e.g., "1101-ABC")
      Gibt zurück:
      Category name if found, otherwise "Unbekannt"

    • calculatePriceForFilling

      public static double calculatePriceForFilling(double sellPrice, double liter, double fillingAmount, ArticleUtils.VolumeUnit unit)
      Calculate price for filling based on sell price, liter information and filling amount
      Parameter:
      sellPrice - Sell price of the article (e.g., 25.54 CHF)
      liter - Liter information from article details (e.g., 10 for "10 lt.")
      fillingAmount - Amount to fill (e.g., 750 for 750ml)
      unit - Unit of filling amount (LITER or MILLILITER)
      Gibt zurück:
      Calculated price for filling

    • calculatePriceForFilling

      public static double calculatePriceForFilling(Article article, double fillingAmount, ArticleUtils.VolumeUnit unit)
      Calculate price for filling based on article details (must contain liter information)
      Parameter:
      article - Article to calculate price for
      fillingAmount - Amount to fill (e.g., 750 for 750ml)
      unit - Unit of filling amount (LITER or MILLILITER)
      Gibt zurück:
      Calculated price for filling
